  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    SendRankMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers the global leaderboard to the client at the end of a game.

  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.boardMessaes

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.boardMessaes that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BoardInitializeMessages
    Socket message that sends the initial board state (offer tiles and default tiles) to the client at game start.
    class 
    OrderOnDefaultTileMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of the updated player order on the default tiles.
    class 
    PlayerPlacedOnOffertileMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a player placed their totem on an offer tile.

  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.drawOneMoreCard

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.drawOneMoreCard that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AskExtraDrawMessage
    Socket message that asks the client to pick an extra card from the end-of-round market snapshot, triggered by the draw-one-more building effect.

  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.gameMessages that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ActionAvailableChangedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that the available actions for the current turn have changed.
    class 
    EraChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the game has advanced to a new era.
    class 
    ErrorMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers an error description to the client (e.g.
    class 
    GamePhaseChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the game phase has changed.
    class 
    GameWinnersMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that delivers the final list of game winners.
    class 
    InitializeGameMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that pushes the initial game state to the client at game start.
    class 
    PlayerAddedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a new player has joined the lobby.
    class 
    PlayerDisconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies all clients when a player disconnects.
    class 
    PlayerReconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies all clients when a player reconnects.
    class 
    PlayerToPlaceChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client which player must place their totem next.
    class 
    PlayerToPlayChangedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client which player must resolve their actions next.
    class 
    PongMessage
    Server-to-client heartbeat response.
    class 
    ResolvedEventMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a specific event has been resolved.

  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.marketMessages

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.marketMessages that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BottomBuildRemovedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a building was removed from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    class 
    BottomCardRemovedMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a tribe card was removed from the previous-round (bottom) market row.
    class 
    InitializeMarketMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that pushes the initial market state (top/bottom card and building rows).
    class 
    TopBuildingRefreshedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the top building row has been refreshed.
    class 
    TopBuildRemovedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a building was removed from the top market row.
    class 
    TopCardRefreshedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client the top card row has been refreshed.
    class 
    TopCardRemovedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client a card was removed from the top market row.

  • Uses of ServerToClientMessage in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.playerMessage

    Classes in it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.webLayer.Socket.messages.playerMessage that implement ServerToClientMessage
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AddedCardToTribeMessage
    Socket message that notifies the client that a tribe card was added to a player's tribe.
    class 
    PlayerDisconnectedMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client that a player has disconnected.
    class 
    PlayerUpdateFoodMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of an updated food total for a player.
    class 
    PlayerUpdatePPMessage
    Server-to-client Socket message that notifies the client of an updated prestige-point total for a player.
